_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of A/B testing and experimentation design, including sample size calculation, randomization methods, guardrail metric selection, and statistical significance interpretation.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-002 (RM, cosine: 0.428), RM-K-004 (RM, cosine: 0.420).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.569). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, testing]. DCWF-only terms [usability] vs WIDAI-only terms [b, calculation, design, experimentation, guardrail, interpretation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.905 (P=0.950, R=0.865). P exceeds R by 0.085 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.5%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of usability testing." and "Knowledge of A/B testing and experimentation design, including sample size calcu". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.438 < STS 0.569 (gap -0.131). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [usability] and [b, calculation, design] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, testing]. DCWF-only: [usability]. WIDAI-only: [b, calculation, design, experimentation, guardrail, interpretation].
